architecture.summary: A neuro-symbolic object detection framework that integrates a deep learning module for aligning object proposals with textual prompts and a symbolic module for logical reasoning. The system processes images and textual queries together, using deep learning to ground language in visual features while enabling compositional query understanding through symbolic reasoning over detected objects and their attributes.
trained_components: deep learning module for prompt-object alignment
vision encoder for object proposal extraction

biblio.title: Integrating Textual Queries with AI-Based Object Detection: A Compositional Prompt-Guided Approach

claims.statement: The framework effectively generalizes to complex queries, combining simple attribute-based descriptions without explicit training on compound prompts
By integrating deep learning with symbolic reasoning, object detection and scene understanding are considerably enhanced, enabling complex, query-driven interactions
